title: [Immersive Vehicles] VDeco
description: Pack for furniture based on Immersive Vehicles features!
body:
ABOUT

This is a pack for Immersive Vehicles, which adds a lot of furniture for Minecraft. Most of the furniture has functionality and has a semi-vanilla style. The wooden decor has all the variations of trees.

HOW TO INSTALL

-Download VDeco

-Download Immersive Vehicles https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles

-Put VDeco and Immersive Vehicles into mods folder in .minecraft

-Play!

FAQ

1. Will there be more furniture?

-Yes, there will be more furniture and more variation.

2. How to install VDeco?

-Look above.

3.Will there be branded devices or furniture?

-Most likely yes, but they will have modified names.
